# Factory Reallocation & Shipping Optimization Recommendation System

## Project Overview

This project helps Nassau Candy Distributor optimize factory-product assignments by predicting shipping lead times and recommending better factory allocations.

## Key Features

- Lead Time Prediction
- Factory Reallocation Simulation
- Recommendation Engine
- Streamlit Dashboard
- Route Risk Analysis
- Distance-Based Logistics Intelligence

## Technologies Used

- Python
- Pandas
- Scikit-Learn
- Streamlit
- Plotly
- Geopy

## Models Used

- Linear Regression
- Random Forest Regressor
- Gradient Boosting Regressor

## Dashboard Modules

- Executive Summary
- Factory Optimization Simulator
- Recommendation Dashboard
- Risk & Impact Panel

## Business Impact

The system identifies optimal factory assignments that can reduce lead times and improve operational efficiency.
